name: Seritage Growth Properties
business: Seritage Growth Properties is a real estate company that owns, develops, redevelops, manages, sells, and leases diversified retail and mixed-use properties throughout the United States. As of December 31, 2025, its portfolio consisted of interests in 10 properties comprising approximately 0.8 million square feet of gross leasable area and 156 acres of land. The company is executing a Plan of Sale to sell all assets, distribute net proceeds to shareholders, and dissolve.

exposures.sentence: Seritage is principally engaged in the ownership, development, redevelopment, management, sale and leasing of diversified retail and mixed-use properties throughout the United States.
